title: FLOSS Weekly 505: This Week in Linux
summary:
Michael is the creator of TuxDigital.com, an Educational Media channel that advocates for Open Source and Linux-based operating systems through teaching, training, and distribution of information. In order to achieve this goal, Michael creates videos and podcasts like This Week in Linux. Michael is also heavily involved in the Open Source and Linux community, where he contributes to many projects.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
